source_scope: Thread-level design review and implementation history in the current Codex research environment project.

policy.default_rule: Do not replace Codex as the main runtime. Absorb stable structures, governance rules, templates, and review contracts into the local stack.

systems.name: agentsmd/agents.md
absorbed_into_local_stack: project rules can only tighten, not expand permissions
systems.notes: This repo became the normative source for root-to-project AGENTS governance.

systems.name: Imbad0202/academic-research-skills
absorbed_into_local_stack: task_type / data_access_level / quality_gate_required / stage_scope / subagent_allowed metadata
watch_items: future metadata refinements for route-level governance
systems.notes: Used as the main structural reference for metadata thickening and stage-level governance.

systems.name: langchain-ai/deepagents
absorbed_into_local_stack: adapter-only boundary under Codex main runtime
not_adopted_by_default: direct takeover of dispatch, gate, or project-state files
watch_items: isolated harness execution when Codex-native execution is insufficient
systems.notes: Kept as a future adapter target, not as a peer main system.

systems.name: wan-huiyan/subagent-driven-development
absorbed_into_local_stack: agent registry fields for isolation and integration review
watch_items: future stronger worktree isolation if local coding swarms become common
systems.notes: Used to thicken subagent execution boundaries, not to replace current routing.

systems.name: obra/superpowers
absorbed_into_local_stack: planning and delivery discipline retained as engineering methodology
watch_items: future deeper integration for spec-review and delivery routines
systems.notes: This is the only external system here that remains both a live plugin and a method source.

systems.name: VoltAgent/awesome-codex-subagents
absorbed_into_local_stack: preferred_model / isolation_method / parallel_safe / integration_review_required / capability_tags in subagent registry
watch_items: future role-library expansion if the research team model grows
systems.notes: Role-library logic was absorbed without importing a large external agent bundle.

systems.name: Leey21/awesome-ai-research-writing
watch_items: future richer style-check helpers for submission-stage writing
systems.notes: Used as the main external reference for the writing-quality layer.

systems.name: ResearAI/DeepScientist
watch_items: future quest-style project templates if a heavier long-form research mode is needed
systems.notes: Its strongest contribution is project structure, not runtime replacement.
